case_title: DON L. BECK ASSOCIATES INC A CALIFORNIA VS. SILICON VALLEY LAW GROUP, A LAW CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DON L. BECK ASSOCIATES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SILICON VALLEY LAW GROUP, A LAW CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION HOGE, FELTON, JONES & APPEL INC A CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-27-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-31-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-12-2006
ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-06-452690 WITH CASE CGC-06-452689, ORDER CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES; ALL FURTHER ENTRIES UNDER CASE CGC-06-452689
PARTIES FROM CONSOLIDATED CASE #452690 ADDED TO LEAD CASE #452689

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DON L. BECK ASSOCIATES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT SILICON VALLEY LAW GROUP, A LAW CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION THIS JUDGMENT IS A CONSOLIDATED WITH SANTA CLARA ACTION, AND CONSOLIDATED SF CASE NOS. 452689 & 452690. SILICON VALLEY LAW GROUP SHALL HAVE AN AWARD OF DAMAGES IN BOTH ACTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND COUNTER-DEFENDANT DON L. BECK, ASSOCIATES, INC. IN THE SF CONSOLIDATED ACTION, AND AGAINST DON L. BECK, DEFENDANT IN THE SANTA CLARA COUNTY ACTION, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, THE THE AMOUNT OF $197,720.00. PLAINTIFF AND COUNTER-DEFENDANT DON L. BECK, ASSOCIATES, INC. IN THE SF CONSOLIDATED ACTION SHALL
